title: Utility And Fast
description: Boost your game experience with this utilities-modded optimization modpack!
body:
An optimization modpack designed to provide more utility features and several decorative features.
This pack includes a carefully selected collection of mods to enhance the gaming experience. ## Optimization To ensure the best performance, we have included several optimization mods. These mods, such as [**BadOptimizations**](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations), [**Dynamic FPS**](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps), [**FerriteCore**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [**Lithium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [**ModernFix**](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix), [**More Culling**](https://github.com/wicivo/MoreCulling), improve various aspects of the game. They optimize chunk generation, dynamically adjust FPS, reduce memory usage, and fix bugs to enhance overall game performance. ## Utility Features To enhance usability and convenience, we have added mods like [**Inventory Profiles Next**](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next), [**BetterF3**](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3), [**clientcommands**](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-commands) and [**Masa Mods**](https://github.com/sakura-ryoko). These mods provide better inventory management, more detailed HUD displays, improved debugging information, and client-side command support. ## Decorative Features To increase visual appeal and immersion, we have integrated several decorative mods, such as [**Falling Leaves**](https://modrinth.com/mod/client-commands), [**FabricSkyboxes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes), [**Visuality**](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality), and [**Sound Physics Remastered**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered). These mods add dynamic particle effects, custom skies, and enhanced sound physics, greatly improving the visual and auditory experience.
